series_metadata.series_title: Electronic Rule Filing Documents for other Agencies
series_metadata.series_description: Documents required in the rule-filing process that the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) enters electronically into the systems of other state agencies or entities including documents entered into any electronic rule-filing system of the Legislative Service Commission (LSC) such as Electronic Rule Filing (ERF).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until all data has been entered into the system of the other agencies and then keep until no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain until all data has been entered into the system of the other agencies and then keep until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
